AI Engineer.description: Design and build artificial intelligence applications using machine learning, deep learning, generative AI, large language models, retrieval augmented generation and AI agents.

Machine Learning Engineer.description: Build, train, evaluate, deploy and maintain machine learning models and data pipelines for production applications.

Data Scientist.description: Analyze data, build statistical and machine learning models, perform experiments and communicate insights using visualizations.

Data Analyst.description: Clean, analyze and visualize business data, create dashboards and communicate actionable findings.

Python Developer.description: Develop applications, automation scripts, APIs and backend services using Python and related frameworks.

Backend Developer.description: Build and maintain server-side applications, REST APIs, databases, authentication systems and scalable backend services.

NLP Engineer.description: Build natural language processing systems using transformers, language models, embeddings, semantic search and text-processing pipelines.

Computer Vision Engineer.description: Develop image and video analysis systems using deep learning, image processing and computer vision models.

DevOps Engineer.description: Automate deployment, infrastructure, integration and monitoring using cloud and container technologies.
